name: Boggle (Find all possible words in a board of characters)
snippet:
23 Jul 2025 — During DFS search , it is crucial to maintain a record of visited cells, ensuring that each cell is used only once in forming any given word .
The idea is to treat every cell in the matrix as a potential starting point and generate all words that begin with the cell using depth-first search. For every generated word, check if it is present in the given set of words.

name: Solving Boggle Using Trie - Algotree
snippet: DFS is used to form all possible strings in the Boggle grid. Trie is used for searching if the string formed using DFS is present in the list of words inserted into it. The idea behind this algorithm is to create a Trie with the list of words that we want to search in the Boggle.
